switches.title: Switch entities
switches.description: Select the switch entities that control the shutter motor.

cover.title: Cover entity
cover.description: Select the cover entity to wrap.

timing.title: Timing calibration
timing.description: Set the travel times measured during calibration.

data_description.travel_time_up: Time in seconds for the shutter to go from fully closed to fully open.
data_description.travel_time_down: Time in seconds for the shutter to go from fully open to fully closed.
data_description.motor_inertia: Delay in seconds before the motor actually starts moving after receiving a command.
data_description.stop_method: How to stop the motor. 'Stop command' sends a stop service call. 'Resend direction' resends the current direction to toggle the motor off (for covers that don't support stop).

error.invalid_time: Travel time must be greater than zero.
Travel time must be greater than zero.
